content:
I’m passionate about mathematics and its applications to physics. Reach me at:
email: rmp at ruimp.com github: github.com/ruimp linkedin: linkedin.com/in/ruimpxt Research Interests # derived geometry operads and higher strucutres factorization algebras homotopy Lie algebras supergeometry (shifted) Poisson geometry (topological) quantum field theory Education # MSc in Applied Mathematics # Instituto Superior Técnico, University of Lisbon - 2021 | 2023
Thesis : Vertex Superalgebras from Prefactorization Algebras
Advisor : John Huerta
BSc in Physics # University of Porto - 2017 | 2021
Publications # Physics # Environmental Sensitivity of Fabry-Perot Microcavities Induced By Layered Graphene-Dielectric Hybrid Coatings - arXiv:2106.01287
summary: I’m passionate about mathematics and its applications to physics.
